description: A handler is defined but no task notifies it, so the intended restart or reload silently never happens.
body: Failure mode: a handler exists but the changing task never notifies it (typo in the name or missing notify), so a needed restart or reload silently never runs and the service keeps stale config. Detection signals: a service running old configuration after a successful play; the handler absent from the run summary; a notify name that does not match the handler name. Do not assume a defined handler runs. Safer fallback: match notify names exactly to handler names, verify the handler appears in a changed run, and flush handlers explicitly for critical restarts.
